verify.rule: All required fields are present and non-empty.
The mass budget is within the expected range for a display model.
All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Each interface has a reciprocal connection with the neighboring subsystem.
Critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.
Boundary conditions are defined with fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces.

risk.desc: The combustion chamber dummy may not provide accurate thermal distribution data due to its non-functional nature.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal simulations using the combustion chamber dummy design to validate the thermal distribution.

risk.desc: The slide rail may not provide sufficient support for handling loads.
risk.mit: Review the slide rail design and perform stress analysis to ensure it can handle the expected loads.

risk.desc: The bolt circle dummy may not provide a repeatable assembly interface.
risk.mit: Ensure the bolt circle dummy is designed with consistent tolerances and clear alignment features.

risk.desc: The cutaway window may not provide clear visibility of internal components.
risk.mit: Optimize the cutaway window design to ensure clear visibility of internal components.

risk.desc: The harness passthrough may not provide sufficient clearance for cable routing.
risk.mit: Review the harness passthrough design and ensure it provides adequate clearance for cable routing.

verify.value: All required fields are present.
verify.rule: All specified fields must be included in the blueprint.

verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must have corresponding geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal features and descriptions.
verify.rule: Each interface must have a matching feature and description in the neighboring subsystem.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence for critical joints is present.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking or preload evidence.

verify.value: Fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces are defined.
verify.rule: Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

verify.value: Geometry_ops coordinates are distributed across the subsystem volume.
verify.rule: Geometry_ops coordinates must span distinct regions within the subsystem envelope.

verify.value: Each part_tree child has at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each child must have at least 4 geometry_ops.

verify.value: All dimensions are physically plausible for the subsystem scale.
verify.rule: Dimensions must match small_launch_vehicle scale and be physically plausible.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of detailed alignment instructions.
risk.mit: Include detailed alignment instructions and datum references in the assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to inadequate thermal management in the display shell.
risk.mit: Implement a thermal management plan to dissipate heat from display components.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if the display shell is not robust enough under handling loads.
risk.mit: Conduct a structural integrity analysis to ensure the shell can withstand handling loads.

risk.desc: Risk of misassembly if the snap-fit interface is not clearly defined.
risk.mit: Ensure the snap-fit interface is clearly defined and easily identifiable.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage if strain relief is not properly implemented.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and proper routing.
